chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-124 of 2022 Constitutional Petition No. D-5294 of 2021 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) Constitutional Petition No. D-124 of 2022 For order as to maintainability Constitutional Petition No. D-5294 of 2021 1. For order on CMA No.9450/2025 (I R. 10) 2. For hearing of main case 26.8.2025 Mr. Riaz Ali advocate for the petitioners in CP No. D-124/2022 Mr. Muhammad Ramzan advocate for the petitioners in CP No. D-5294/2021 Ms. Wajiha Mehdi, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Mujtaba Ahmed Bajwa advocate for the respondent / Pakistan Steel Mills -------------------------------- Learned counsel for the petitioners state that they would be satisfied if the petitioners, if they have not done so already, to be allowed to approach the NIRC in respect of their grievance. In the event that they have already approached the NIRC and has decided their grievance, then this avenue would not be available to them. The NIRC shall decide the application of the petitioners in the event that they move one strictly in accordance with law taking in view the question of limitation. Learned counsel for the Pakistan Steel Mills as well as learned Assistant Attorney General have no objection to such proposition. Order accordingly. A copy of this order shall be sent to the Chairman, NIRC, for information. Petitions stand disposed of and all listed applications are dismissed. Office to place a copy of this order in the connected matter. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
